portal_chat_threads_private_user_check.name: portal_chat_threads_private_user_check
portal_chat_threads_private_user_check.value: ("portal_chat_threads"."thread_type" = 'private' and "portal_chat_threads"."portal_user_id" is not null) or ("portal_chat_threads"."thread_type" = 'group' and "portal_chat_threads"."portal_user_id" is null)
